sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85539" key="poluxei/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-χείμερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χειμών</etym>) <sense id="n85539.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very wintry,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:429" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.429</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
